turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE ROBERTS
turns.text: Justice Alito has the opinion of the Court this morning in Case 22-982, Thornell versus Jones.

turns.name: JUSTICE ALITO
turns.text: 32 years ago Danny Lee Jones brutally murdered Robert Weaver, Weaver’s 7-year-old daughter, and Weaver's grandmother in order to steal Weaver's gun collection. The Ninth Circuit held that Jones’ Sixth Amendment right to the effective assistance of counsel was violated by defense counsel’s failure to introduce certain mitigating evidence during the sentencing phase of his capital trial. In reaching this conclusion the Ninth Circuit substantially departed from the standard for ineffective assistance articulated by the Court in Strickland versus Washington. As our opinion explained, the Ninth Circuit overstated the strength of Jones’ new mitigating evidence and it all but ignored the strong aggravating circumstances in this case. We therefore reverse the judgement below. The opinion of the Court is joined by the Chief Justice and Justices Thomas, Gorsuch, Kavanaugh and Barrett. Justice Sotomayor has filed a dissent, joined by Justice Kagan. Justice Jackson has also filed a dissent.
